title: Good Kid Songs and more
description: Replaces the 5, 11, 13, blocks, cat and chirp music discs with the ones from the Good Kid 1 Album   (Credits for songs to https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCW2QxqqE_j-utMTBq5Oh2fA )
body:
Replaces the 5, 11, 13, blocks, cat and Chirp music discs with the one from the good kid 1 Album

Support the Band that made the album ❤️ https://goodkid.bandcamp.com/music](https://goodkid.bandcamp.com/music)
